title: Automate using number column
excerpt:
I want ot set an automation in the number column, add some condition to it like for example, when the Number column is greater than 60 then send alert. 
I can’t find any possible way to do this. Please help. 
#workflows

posts.author: Soumyajit_1995 (Soumyajit Bhattacharya)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: ryanDAR (RyDAR)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks, @kolaai. I got excited to find your answer. Unfortunately, this automation doesn’t work for formulas and it seems there’s no automation for formulas. It seems odd that you would even need an automation for a number you have manually changed. Do you know of any way to automate based on the number of a formula.
